response: THE CLOCK TICKS AS ALEX CALCULATES THE WEIGHT. THE CLOCK TICKS AS THE MATH IS SOLVED. THE CLOCK TICKS TOWARD THE RACE. THE FINAL WEIGHT W_F IS W MULTIPLIED BY (0.98) TO THE POWER OF N. TO ACHIEVE A 25% REDUCTION IN ENERGY EXPENDITURE, WE SOLVE 1 - (0.98)^N EQUALS 0.25. THIS MEANS (0.98)^N EQUALS 0.75. TAKING THE NATURAL LOGARITHM OF BOTH SIDES, N TIMES LN(0.98) EQUALS LN(0.75). DIVIDING LN(0.75) BY LN(0.98) GIVES APPROXIMATELY 13.86. SINCE N MUST BE A WHOLE NUMBER, ALEX NEEDS AT LEAST 14 COMPONENTS. THE CLOCK TICKS ON. THE CLOCK TICKS ON. THE CLOCK TICKS ON.
